title: doellingeria humilis
intro: Doellingeria humilis, also known as the narrow-leaved false goldenrod, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family. It is native to eastern North America, and its leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as digestive problems, wounds, and infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Doellingeria humilis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
